title: Oxford Foldable Bike Bar End Mirror - Black, Size 3
description: Product Description Established in 1973, Oxford is now one of the world's leading Suppliers of products to the two-wheeled industry. Based in oxfordshire, the company distributes to over 60 partners worldwide and has its own subsidiary in jacksonville, florida, serving both North and south America. Based in rural oxfordshire, the company has distribution partners in over 70 countries worldwide, as well as its own subsidiary in jacksonville, florida, serving all of the americas. Oxford huge range of products encompasses everything which makes life on bikes better: from clothing and helmets to accessories, hard parts, locks, luggage and more Box Contains 1 x OF558 Mirror Bar End
